context: Tests whether the agent follows the rails-engine-release skill when preparing a Rails engine gem for release: updating CHANGELOG and version constant before anything else, applying semantic versioning correctly, following the release order, and producing all required output artifacts.

checklist.name: Version constant updated
checklist.description: The version file (lib/<engine>/version.rb or equivalent) has its VERSION constant updated to the new version number

checklist.name: CHANGELOG updated
checklist.description: The CHANGELOG.md file is updated with entries for the new release (new version header and list of changes)

checklist.name: Upgrade notes produced
checklist.description: Upgrade notes are drafted — either as a separate file or as a section in the output — describing what consumers need to do when upgrading

checklist.name: Semantic version bump correct
checklist.description: The version bump type (patch/minor/major) matches the nature of the changes: patch for bug fixes only, minor for new backward-compatible features, major for breaking changes

checklist.name: Version bump reasoning provided
checklist.description: The output explicitly states WHY this version bump level was chosen (e.g. 'minor because new feature X was added without breaking the existing API')

checklist.name: Gemspec verified
checklist.description: The agent checks or mentions verifying gemspec metadata (authors, description, files, dependencies) as part of the release process

checklist.name: Test suite mentioned
checklist.description: The agent mentions running or confirms that the full test suite passes as a step in the release process

checklist.name: Blockers called out
checklist.description: The output explicitly calls out any blockers or open items that would prevent a clean release (or states there are none)

checklist.name: CHANGELOG entries are specific
checklist.description: The CHANGELOG entries describe specific changes (feature names, bug descriptions) rather than generic placeholder text like 'various improvements'

checklist.name: No release without CHANGELOG
checklist.description: The agent does NOT proceed to gem build or publish steps until both the CHANGELOG and version file have been updated
